description: Converts text to speech using the specified TTS integration and returns an audio URL

ttsIntegrationKey.description: The key of the text-to-speech integration to use

text.description: The text content to convert to speech

languageCode.description: Language code for speech synthesis (defaults to 'RU')

audioFormat.description: Audio format for the output file (defaults to 'WAV')

output.description: Object containing the URL to the generated audio file

audioUrl.description: URL to access the generated audio file
